corrections.correct: Καὶ ἐπέπεσεν αὐτῶν ὁ φόβος, ὅτι εἶπον
corrections.note: The phrase ὅτι εἶπον is present in the printed text after λαόν,
Transcript displaced ὅτι εἶπον and misread εἶπον as εἶπαν; only one occurrence should remain, before the quotation.
Initial epsilon is visible in the scan.
Printed apparatus has nom. sacrum ἰς followed by siglum c.a, not a single fused token.
Possible issue retained; no clear correction proposed.
Printed apparatus reads τῳ Αλκιμῳ for א*.

uncertain.note: The segment after οι και appears to read 6ο* in the scan/transcript, but the exact printed form is unclear; not confident enough to normalize.

notes: Body otherwise matches page, including running head and page number omission. Apparatus mostly matches, but line 20 case is wrong in the transcript; line 16 spacing around nomina sacra/sigla is slightly off.
